"[Preset]"
"Base_Preset=\Shell (Empty) Presets\Spooky Cold Laser (L) - JW"
"PresetName=Cold (Current Strains) (DNA) (L) - JW"
"Enable_Remove_Duplicate_Frequencies=1"
"Remove_Duplicate_Frequencies_Tolerance=.125"
"Preset_Notes=The common cold, also known simply as a cold, is a viral infectious disease of the upper respiratory tract that primarily affects the nose. The throat, sinuses, and larynx may also be affected. Signs and symptoms may appear less than two days after exposure to the virus.||This preset holds genome data for active viruses which recently caused the common cold.||Run this preset for as long as possible. We recommend you also run detox programs in Remote mode.||Connect Spooky Laser directly to Out 1 of your generator. Do not use a boosted output.||As with all laser products, do not shine the light directly into your eyes. Use the protection glasses provided."
"Loaded_Programs=Cold (Current Strains) (DNA) (L) - JW (CUST)"
"Loaded_Frequencies=~4967B76220,~8779B04321,~3116B63160,~1612B29128,~9953B34190,~3655B37214,~8003B40338,~6608B97356,~7252B54971,~8542B37292,~3989B58088,~1585B37242,~2139B01331,~3428B06173,~8975B58038,~6471B83700,~7025B06987,~9414B83797,~6275B91711,~4770B83701,~2001B75459,~6714B83303,~1151B57573,~9757B31795,~7998B37429,~1690B54947,~6047B06009,~4643B07425,~5297B09151,~7586B76874,~1024B01263,~9529B18677,~0173B40384,~2562B01682,~6910B54951,~4406B06903,~5160B37598,~7459B18137,~4219B54921,~9392B09664,~8623B37195,~6656B09375,~1003B53129,~9609B96871,~7830B83332,~2542B65889,~6989B67960,~4585B93001,~5139B83334,~7428B61201,~1976B09010,~9461B58283,~0025B21253,~2415B16110,~7852B29030,~4358B76668,~5002B3019,~7391B1898,~2738B1866,~0234B5076,~1988B1851,~5690B1392,~9048B3290,~7633B1228,~6874B6385,~0587B1860,~5024B3342,~2520B5093,~1751B06142,~5563B37874,~0900B69178,~8406B83465,~9150B01405,~0449B06817,~5897B58196,~3492B83323,~4046B24984,~5335B54284,~0773B06133,~8379B23372,~6519B61557,~8809B18361,~5769B23168,~3265B54253,~1496B91720,~6208B54229,~0645B01356,~8141B06506,~6372B83310,~1184B06508,~5532B01359,~3027B39984,~4781B91333,~6071B24488,~0418B92576,~8014B92835,~9668B24291,~1957B56830,~6494B38079,~3990B80553,~4544B84354,~6933B50306,~3704B41490,~9886B35411,~0530B96239,~4243B65671,~8680B93086,~6186B61258,~5417B06304,~9129B61259,~4566B61238,~1162B29775,~3716B81751,~4005B62033,~9553B93067,~7058B97446,~8602B50625,~9091B37231,~4439B91702,~2935B39023,~3689B76895,~4978B31786,~9325B39212,~7821B83357,~8575B16363,~2277B80653,~7625B91336,~5220B62744,~5202B69856,~9914B08509,~4351B61141,~2957B09275,~0188B07430,~4890B61582,~9348B94423,~7833B64535,~8497B35745,~0887B08707,~4224B39989,~2720B48291,~3474B83353,~5763B64651,~9100B29769,~7606B37201,~8350B50794,~0649B37572,~7410B37531,~5005B29705,~3246B03015,~8959B10157,~2496B64124,~0992B97474,"
